text:
Medicare-Medicaid Linked Enrollee Analytic Data Source (MMLEADS) V2.0
Medicaid Service File Data Dictionary
Note: File is at the Bene_ID/SRVC_3 level (MSIS_ID/State/SRVC_3 level for Medicaid only eligible without a BENE_ID)
Category Variable Name Description Values
Identifiers BENE_ID CCW beneficiary ID up to 15 alphanumeric characters
 MSIS_ID State reported MSIS ID used for individuals who do not have a valid BENE_ID up to 20 alphanumeric characters
 STATE_CD MDCD State for used for
